en: Hi there! I'm U-Pal, your UWTSD student assistant. I can help with admissions, courses, fees, accommodation, IT support, wellbeing and more. What would you like to know?
Hello! Welcome to U-Pal, your guide to all things UWTSD. Ask me anything about student life, courses, or university services.
cy: Helo! U-Pal ydw i, eich cynorthwyydd myfyrwyr PCYDDS. Gallaf eich helpu gyda derbyniadau, cyrsiau, ffioedd, llety, cymorth TG, lles a mwy. Beth hoffech chi wybod?
Shwmae! Croeso i U-Pal, eich canllaw i bopeth am PCYDDS. Gofynnwch unrhyw beth am fywyd myfyrwyr, cyrsiau neu wasanaethau'r brifysgol.

patterns: help me understand what you do
am I speaking to a bot

en: Yes, I can understand you! I am U-Pal, UWTSD's student assistant chatbot. I can help you with: admissions and applications, course information, tuition fees and student finance, accommodation, campus locations, IT support (Moodle, portal, Wi-Fi), library services, student wellbeing, careers, and more. Just ask me a question!

I'm U-Pal, here to help UWTSD students and applicants. You can ask me about admissions, courses, fees, accommodation, IT support, campus locations, the library, wellbeing services, the students' union, graduation, and much more. What would you like to know?
Hi there! I'm working and ready to help. I'm U-Pal — a bilingual chatbot for UWTSD. Ask me anything about studying at UWTSD: applications, courses, fees, accommodation, IT, wellbeing, and more.
cy: Ydw, gallaf eich deall chi! Rwy'n U-Pal, cynorthwyydd myfyrwyr PCYDDS. Gallaf helpu gyda: derbyniadau a cheisiadau, gwybodaeth am gyrsiau, ffioedd dysgu a chyllid myfyrwyr, llety, lleoliadau campws, cymorth TG, gwasanaethau llyfrgell, lles myfyrwyr, gyrfaoedd, a mwy. Gofynnwch gwestiwn i mi!

Rwy'n U-Pal, yma i helpu myfyrwyr a ymgeiswyr PCYDDS. Gallwch ofyn i mi am dderbyniadau, cyrsiau, ffioedd, llety, cymorth TG, lleoliadau campws, y llyfrgell, gwasanaethau lles, undeb y myfyrwyr, graddio, a llawer mwy. Beth hoffech chi ei wybod?

en: Goodbye! Good luck with your studies at UWTSD. Feel free to come back if you have more questions.
Take care! If you need anything else, U-Pal is always here to help.
cy: Da boch chi! Pob lwc gyda'ch astudiaethau ym PCYDDS. Croeso i ddod nôl os oes gennych fwy o gwestiynau.
Hwyl fawr! Os oes angen unrhyw beth arall arnoch chi, mae U-Pal bob amser yma i helpu.

en: You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with?
Happy to help! Let me know if you have any other questions about UWTSD.
cy: Croeso! Oes unrhyw beth arall y gallaf eich helpu ag ef?
Hapus i helpu! Rhowch wybod os oes gennych gwestiynau eraill am PCYDDS.

patterns: what kind of questions can I ask

en: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! I'm U-Pal, a student support chatbot for UWTSD students. I can answer questions about admissions, courses, fees, accommodation, campus life, wellbeing, IT and more. What can I help you with?
I'm a chatbot, so always ready to help! I'm U-Pal, trained to answer questions about UWTSD university life. Ask away!
cy: Rydw i'n iawn diolch! U-Pal ydw i, chatbot cymorth myfyrwyr ar gyfer myfyrwyr PCYDDS. Gallaf ateb cwestiynau am dderbyniadau, cyrsiau, ffioedd, llety, bywyd campws, lles, TG a mwy.
Chatbot ydw i felly bob amser yn barod i helpu! U-Pal ydw i, wedi fy hyfforddi i ateb cwestiynau am fywyd prifysgol PCYDDS. Gofynnwch!

patterns: how to sign up for a course
sut mae gwneud cais i pcydds

en: To apply to UWTSD, you can apply directly through uwtsd.ac.uk/study or through UCAS (ucas.com) for undergraduate courses. International students can also apply directly. Choose your course, check entry requirements, and submit your application. The admissions team can help on 01267 676767 or admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk.

Applying to UWTSD is straightforward. For most undergraduate courses, apply via UCAS (ucas.com). For postgraduate or direct entry, go to uwtsd.ac.uk/study. You'll need to choose your campus preference: Swansea, Carmarthen, or Lampeter. Need help choosing a course? Just ask!
cy: I wneud cais i PCYDDS, gallwch wneud cais yn uniongyrchol trwy pcydds.ac.uk/study neu trwy UCAS (ucas.com) ar gyfer cyrsiau israddedig. Ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/study a dewis eich cwrs i ddechrau. Gall y tîm derbyniadau helpu ar 01267 676767 neu admissions@pcydds.ac.uk.
Mae gwneud cais i PCYDDS yn syml. Ar gyfer y rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig, gwnewch gais trwy UCAS (ucas.com). Ar gyfer mynediad ôl-raddedig neu uniongyrchol, ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/study.

patterns: what do I need to get in
do I have the right grades
can I get in with my grades
can I apply with a btec
do I need maths and english
beth sydd ei angen i fynd i mewn
a fyddaf yn cael fy nerbyn

en: Entry requirements vary by course at UWTSD. Most undergraduate courses require 80-120 UCAS points (roughly 2-3 A-levels at grade C or above). UWTSD also considers mature students, Access to HE qualifications, and BTECs. Check the specific course page at uwtsd.ac.uk for exact requirements.

Requirements differ by course. UWTSD welcomes students with A-levels, BTECs, Access to HE, Scottish Highers, and Welsh Baccalaureate. Foundation year options are also available if you don't quite meet the standard entry requirements. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for your specific course.
cy: Mae gofynion mynediad yn amrywio yn ôl cwrs ym PCYDDS. Mae'r rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig yn gofyn am 80-120 pwynt UCAS. Mae PCYDDS hefyd yn ystyried myfyrwyr aeddfed, cymwysterau Mynediad i AU, a BTECs.
Mae gofynion yn amrywio yn ôl cwrs. Mae PCYDDS yn croesawu myfyrwyr â lefelau A, BTECs, Mynediad i AU, Uwch Raddau Albanaidd, a Bagloriaeth Cymru. Mae opsiynau blwyddyn sylfaen hefyd ar gael.

patterns: is it too late to apply
a allaf wneud cais yn hwyr
oes hi'n rhy hwyr i wneud cais

en: The main UCAS deadline for most undergraduate courses is usually late January for September entry. UWTSD also accepts applications through UCAS Extra and Clearing after this date. Postgraduate and part-time courses often have rolling admissions. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study or call 01267 676767 for the latest deadlines.

Key deadlines: UCAS main deadline is usually 29 January for September entry. UWTSD participates in Clearing from mid-August for students whose results differ from expectations. Postgraduate courses often have flexible deadlines. Email admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk for specifics.
cy: Y prif ddyddiad cau UCAS ar gyfer y rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig fel arfer yw diwedd Ionawr ar gyfer mynediad ym mis Medi. Mae PCYDDS hefyd yn derbyn ceisiadau trwy UCAS Extra a Chlirio ar ôl y dyddiad hwn.

Dyddiad cau allweddol: Y prif ddyddiad cau UCAS fel arfer yw 29 Ionawr ar gyfer mynediad ym mis Medi. Mae PCYDDS yn cymryd rhan mewn Clirio o ganol mis Awst. Cysylltwch â admissions@pcydds.ac.uk am fanylion penodol.

en: International students are very welcome at UWTSD! Apply directly through uwtsd.ac.uk/international. You'll likely need a Student Visa if from outside the UK. UWTSD's International Office supports you with visa guidance, language requirements, and pastoral care. Contact international@uwtsd.ac.uk.

UWTSD welcomes students from over 50 countries. Apply via uwtsd.ac.uk/international. Key requirements: proof of English proficiency (usually IELTS 6.0+), academic transcripts, valid passport. The International Office guides you through the visa process at international@uwtsd.ac.uk.
cy: Mae myfyrwyr rhyngwladol yn fwy na chroesawus ym PCYDDS! Gwnewch gais yn uniongyrchol trwy pcydds.ac.uk/international. Bydd angen Fisa Myfyriwr arnoch os ydych chi o'r tu allan i'r DU. Cysylltwch â international@pcydds.ac.uk.
Mae PCYDDS yn croesawu myfyrwyr o dros 50 gwlad. Gofynion allweddol: tystiolaeth o hyfedredd yn y Saesneg (fel arfer IELTS 6.0+), trawsgrifiadau academaidd, pasbort dilys.

patterns: what if I don't have grades
can I still get into university
nid wyf yn bodloni gofynion mynediad

en: UWTSD offers Foundation Year programmes for students who don't quite meet standard entry requirements. Great for mature students, those returning to education, or with non-traditional qualifications. Successfully completing the Foundation Year guarantees progression to Year 1 of your chosen degree. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for available pathways.

UWTSD's Foundation Year is a great stepping stone into university. It's designed for students who need extra preparation before degree-level study. After passing, you move directly into Year 1. Ask admissions at admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk about foundation year options.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig rhaglenni Blwyddyn Sylfaen ar gyfer myfyrwyr nad ydynt yn bodloni'r gofynion mynediad safonol. Ar ôl cwblhau'r Flwyddyn Sylfaen yn llwyddiannus, byddwch yn symud i Flwyddyn 1 eich gradd ddewisol.

Mae Blwyddyn Sylfaen PCYDDS yn gam gwych i mewn i'r brifysgol. Ar ôl pasio, byddwch yn symud yn uniongyrchol i Flwyddyn 1. Gofynnwch i dderbyniadau ar admissions@pcydds.ac.uk am opsiynau blwyddyn sylfaen.

patterns: what can I do at uwtsd
pa raddau mae pcydds yn eu cynnig

en: UWTSD offers a huge range of courses including Art and Design, Business, Computing, Education, Engineering, Health and Social Care, Humanities, Law, Nursing, Psychology, Sport Science, Social Work, Welsh and many more. Courses are available at undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional levels. Browse the full list at uwtsd.ac.uk/study.

UWTSD has over 100 courses across its campuses. Highlights include Education, Nursing, Art and Design, Business, Welsh medium courses, and Sustainability. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/study and filter by subject, level, or campus to find what suits you.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig ystod enfawr o gyrsiau gan gynnwys Celf a Dylunio, Busnes, Cyfrifiadureg, Addysg, Peirianneg, Iechyd a Gofal Cymdeithasol, Dyniaethau, y Gyfraith, Nyrsio, Seicoleg, Gwyddor Chwaraeon, Gwaith Cymdeithasol, Cymraeg a llawer mwy. Browiwch y rhestr lawn ar pcydds.ac.uk/study.
Mae gan PCYDDS dros 100 o gyrsiau ar draws ei champysau. Ymwelwch â pcydds.ac.uk/study a hidlwch yn ôl pwnc, lefel, neu gampws.

en: UWTSD offers Computing and IT-related degrees mainly at the Swansea SA1 campus. Courses include BSc Computer Science, BSc Software Engineering, BSc Cybersecurity, and related programmes. These are industry-focused with strong links to employers. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/study and search 'computing' for the full list.

UWTSD has a strong Computing department at Swansea. Courses cover programming, networking, cybersecurity, software development, and data science. Many include industry placements. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for up-to-date course details and UCAS codes.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig graddau Cyfrifiadureg a TG yn bennaf ar gampws SA1 Abertawe. Mae cyrsiau'n cynnwys BSc Gwyddor Cyfrifiadur, BSc Peirianneg Meddalwedd, BSc Seiberddiogelwch. Ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/study a chwiliwch am 'cyfrifiadureg'.
Mae gan PCYDDS adran Cyfrifiadureg gref yn Abertawe. Mae cyrsiau'n ymdrin â rhaglennu, rhwydweithio, seiberddiogelwch, datblygu meddalwedd, a gwyddor data.

en: UWTSD has an excellent reputation for Nursing and Health Sciences. Courses include Adult Nursing (BSc), Mental Health Nursing (BSc), and Health and Social Care programmes. Nursing is primarily based at Swansea campus and is NMC-accredited with clinical placements throughout. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/study for current intake dates.

Nursing at UWTSD is highly regarded. BSc Nursing programmes include real clinical placements across NHS Wales. Based mainly at Swansea with some teaching at Carmarthen. Entry typically requires specific science GCSEs. See uwtsd.ac.uk for details.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS enw da rhagorol am Nyrsio a Gwyddorau Iechyd. Mae cyrsiau'n cynnwys Nyrsio Oedolion (BSc), Nyrsio Iechyd Meddwl (BSc), a rhaglenni Iechyd a Gofal Cymdeithasol. Mae cyrsiau Nyrsio wedi'u lleoli'n bennaf ar gampws Abertawe.
Mae Nyrsio ym PCYDDS yn cael ei ystyried yn uchel. Mae rhaglenni BSc Nyrsio yn cynnwys lleoliadau clinigol go iawn ar draws GIG Cymru. Gweler pcydds.ac.uk/nyrsio am fanylion.

en: UWTSD is one of Wales' leading teacher training institutions. Courses include BA Education (Primary), PGCE Primary, PGCE Secondary (various subjects), and BA Childhood Studies. The Carmarthen campus is the main hub for Education, accredited by the Education Workforce Council (EWC) of Wales. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/study.

Teacher training at UWTSD is mainly at Carmarthen campus. You can train to teach in Welsh-medium or English-medium schools. Programmes include the PGCE and undergraduate BA Education. Placement schools are local and community-focused.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn un o sefydliadau hyfforddi athrawon blaenllaw Cymru. Mae cyrsiau'n cynnwys BA Addysg (Cynradd), TAR Cynradd, TAR Uwchradd (pynciau amrywiol), a BA Astudiaethau Plentyndod. Campws Caerfyrddin yw'r prif ganolfan ar gyfer Addysg.

Mae hyfforddiant athrawon ym PCYDDS wedi'i leoli'n bennaf ar gampws Caerfyrddin. Gallwch hyfforddi i ddysgu mewn ysgolion cyfrwng Cymraeg neu Saesneg. Mae rhaglenni'n cynnwys y TAR a BA Addysg israddedig.

en: Tuition fees at UWTSD for home (UK) students are currently £9,000 per year for most full-time undergraduate courses. Welsh students may be eligible for a Tuition Fee Loan from Student Finance Wales covering the full amount, so nothing is paid upfront. Postgraduate fees vary. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/fees for the latest figures.

For current entry, UWTSD charges £9,000 per year for full-time undergraduate courses. Welsh-domiciled students can apply for a Tuition Fee Loan to cover this in full, repaid through salary once you earn over the threshold. Part-time fees are pro-rata. See uwtsd.ac.uk/fees.
cy: Mae ffioedd dysgu ym PCYDDS ar gyfer myfyrwyr cartref (DU) ar hyn o bryd yn £9,000 y flwyddyn ar gyfer y rhan fwyaf o gyrsiau israddedig amser llawn. Efallai y bydd myfyrwyr Cymreig yn gymwys am Fenthyciad Ffi Dysgu gan Gyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru.

Mae PCYDDS yn codi £9,000 y flwyddyn ar gyfer cyrsiau israddedig amser llawn. Gall myfyrwyr sy'n byw yng Nghymru wneud cais am Fenthyciad Ffi Dysgu i dalu hyn yn llawn. Gweler pcydds.ac.uk/fees am fanylion llawn.

patterns: how to apply for student finance
how much loan will I get
do I qualify for a loan
when do I pay back loan
pryd i dalu benthyciad yn ôl

en: Student Finance Wales (studentfinancewales.co.uk) provides Tuition Fee Loans and Maintenance Loans for eligible Welsh-domiciled students. You can borrow up to £9,000 for fees and a maintenance loan towards living costs. You only repay once you earn over £25,000. Applications usually open in spring. Call 0300 200 4050.

Welsh students studying at UWTSD can apply to Student Finance Wales for: 1) Tuition Fee Loan covering fees entirely, 2) Maintenance Loan helping with living costs (amount depends on household income). Apply at studentfinancewales.co.uk. It's free to apply and nothing is paid upfront.
cy: Mae Cyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru (cyllidmyfyrwyrcymru.co.uk) yn darparu Benthyciadau Ffi Dysgu a Benthyciadau Cynhaliaeth ar gyfer myfyrwyr cymwys sy'n byw yng Nghymru. Dim ond ar ôl ennill dros £25,000 y byddwch yn ad-dalu. Ffoniwch 0300 200 4050.
Gall myfyrwyr Cymreig sy'n astudio ym PCYDDS wneud cais i Gyllid Myfyrwyr Cymru am: 1) Benthyciad Ffi Dysgu, 2) Benthyciad Cynhaliaeth. Ymgeisiwch ar cyllidmyfyrwyrcymru.co.uk.

en: UWTSD offers a range of scholarships and bursaries including sports scholarships, Welsh language scholarships, subject-specific bursaries, and care leaver bursaries. Awards vary from a few hundred to several thousand pounds. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/scholarships or contact finance@uwtsd.ac.uk for the current list.

Funding opportunities at UWTSD include Welsh-medium study bursaries, sports performance scholarships, subject bursaries, and hardship funds. The Students' Union also has emergency funds. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/scholarships and apply early as spaces are limited.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig ystod o ysgoloriaethau a bwrsariaethau gan gynnwys ysgoloriaethau chwaraeon, ysgoloriaethau iaith Gymraeg, bwrsariaethau penodol i bynciau, a bwrsariaethau gofalwyr. Ewch i pcydds.ac.uk/ysgoloriaethau.

Mae sawl cyfle cyllido ym PCYDDS: bwrsariaethau astudio cyfrwng Cymraeg, ysgoloriaethau perfformiad chwaraeon, bwrsariaethau pwnc, a chronfeydd caledi. Edrychwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/ysgoloriaethau a gwnewch gais yn gynnar.

en: The UWTSD student portal is called MyStudy, accessible at mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Use your student ID number and password set up at enrolment. Through MyStudy you can view timetables, access services, and check notices. Login issues? Contact IT Services on 01792 481 111 or itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) is your main student portal. Login with your student number and enrolment password. Forgotten your password? Use the 'Forgot Password' link on the login page or call IT Services on 01792 481 111.
cy: Porth myfyrwyr PCYDDS yw MyStudy, y gellir ei gyrchu ar mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Defnyddiwch eich rhif myfyriwr a chyfrinair. Os oes problemau mewngofnodi, cysylltwch â Gwasanaethau TG ar 01792 481 111.

MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk) yw eich prif borth myfyrwyr. Mewngofnodwch gyda'ch rhif myfyriwr a'ch cyfrinair. Wedi anghofio eich cyfrinair? Defnyddiwch y ddolen 'Anghofio Cyfrinair' ar y dudalen mewngofnodi.

patterns: where do I find lecture notes

en: UWTSD uses Moodle as its Virtual Learning Environment (VLE) at vle.uwtsd.ac.uk. Log in with your student username and password. You'll find course materials, lecture notes, assignment briefs, and submission portals there. Problems accessing your modules? Contact your lecturer or IT Services at itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

Moodle (vle.uwtsd.ac.uk) is UWTSD's online learning platform. All course content, reading lists, recordings, and submission portals are there. Use your student credentials to log in. Help guides are available at uwtsd.ac.uk/it.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn defnyddio Moodle fel ei Amgylchedd Dysgu Rhithwir ar vle.uwtsd.ac.uk. Mewngofnodwch gyda'ch enw defnyddiwr a chyfrinair myfyrwyr. Byddwch yn dod o hyd i'ch deunyddiau cwrs, nodiadau darlith, a phortholau cyflwyno yno.
Moodle (vle.uwtsd.ac.uk) yw platfform dysgu ar-lein PCYDDS. Mae'ch holl gynnwys cwrs, rhestrau darllen, recordiadau, a phortholau cyflwyno yno. Defnyddiwch eich manylion myfyrwyr i fewngofnodi.

en: For IT support at UWTSD, contact IT Services: Phone 01792 481 111, email itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk, or visit the IT Service Desk on campus. They help with password resets, software access, wifi issues, laptop problems and more. Usually open Monday to Friday 8:30am to 5pm during term time.

UWTSD IT Services is at itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk or 01792 481 111. They handle everything from login problems and Moodle access to wifi and printing. There's also a self-service portal at uwtsd.ac.uk/it for common issues.
cy: Am gymorth TG ym PCYDDS, cysylltwch â Gwasanaethau TG: Ffôn 01792 481 111, e-bost itservices@pcydds.ac.uk, neu ewch i Ddesg Gwasanaeth TG ar y campws. Gallant helpu gydag ailosod cyfrineiriau, mynediad meddalwedd, problemau wifi, a phroblemau gliniadur.
Gellir cysylltu â Gwasanaethau TG PCYDDS ar itservices@pcydds.ac.uk neu 01792 481 111. Maent yn ymdrin â phopeth o broblemau mewngofnodi a mynediad Moodle i wifi ac argraffu.

en: UWTSD campuses use the eduroam wifi network. To connect: select 'eduroam' on your device and enter your full UWTSD email address and student password. Eduroam works at universities worldwide. Problems connecting? Contact IT Services at 01792 481 111.

Campus wifi is eduroam, available across all UWTSD buildings. Use your student email and password to connect. The great thing about eduroam is it works at most universities in the UK and around the world. IT Services on 01792 481 111 can help with connection issues.
cy: Mae campysau PCYDDS yn defnyddio rhwydwaith wifi eduroam. I gysylltu: dewiswch 'eduroam' ar eich dyfais a rhowch eich cyfeiriad e-bost PCYDDS llawn a'ch cyfrinair myfyrwyr. Problemau cysylltu? Cysylltwch â Gwasanaethau TG ar 01792 481 111.
Wifi y campws yw eduroam, ar gael ar draws holl adeiladau PCYDDS. Defnyddiwch eich e-bost myfyrwyr a chyfrinair i gysylltu. Mae eduroam hefyd yn gweithio yn y rhan fwyaf o brifysgolion yn y DU.

en: UWTSD offers student accommodation at the Swansea and Carmarthen campuses with en-suite and shared bathroom options in halls of residence. Great for first-year students. Apply at uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation or email accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk. Places are popular so apply early.

UWTSD has on-campus accommodation at Swansea and Carmarthen. Rooms range from standard to en-suite. Halls are self-catered or catered depending on the campus. Private student accommodation is also available nearby. Contact accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk for availability.

UWTSD offers student accommodation at several campuses. Apply through HallPad at uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation. Rooms are available at Carmarthen and Lampeter campuses. Costs vary by room type — check the accommodation pages for current prices. Email accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk for specific queries.

Student halls are available at Carmarthen and Lampeter. Applications go through HallPad — visit uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation to check availability and apply. For questions about costs, room types, or your application, email accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig llety myfyrwyr ar gampysau Abertawe a Chaerfyrddin gydag ystafelloedd en-suite a chyfleusterau ymolchi a rennir. Gwych ar gyfer myfyrwyr blwyddyn gyntaf. Ymgeisiwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/llety neu anfonwch e-bost at accommodation@pcydds.ac.uk.
Mae gan PCYDDS lety ar y campws yn Abertawe a Chaerfyrddin. Mae ystafelloedd yn amrywio o safonol i en-suite. Cysylltwch ag accommodation@pcydds.ac.uk am argaeledd.

Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig llety myfyrwyr ar sawl campws. Ymgeisiwch drwy HallPad ar uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation. Mae ystafelloedd ar gael yng Nghaerfyrddin a Llambed. E-bostiwch accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk am ymholiadau penodol.

Mae neuaddau preswyl ar gael yng Nghaerfyrddin a Llambed. Ewch i uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation i wirio argaeledd ac ymgeisio drwy HallPad. Am gwestiynau am gostau, mathau o ystafelloedd, neu eich cais, e-bostiwch accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk.

patterns: how much to live on campus
faint i fyw ar y campws

en: Accommodation prices at UWTSD vary by campus and room type, generally around £90 to £140 per week for a standard room in halls. En-suite rooms are slightly more. Most prices include utilities and wifi. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation for current rates or email accommodation@uwtsd.ac.uk.

UWTSD accommodation typically costs £90 to £140 per week depending on room type and campus. Most rooms include wifi, water, heating and electricity. Compared to private renting, halls offer great value especially in your first year. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/accommodation for current pricing.
cy: Mae prisiau llety ym PCYDDS yn amrywio yn ôl campws a math o ystafell, yn gyffredinol oddeutu £90 i £140 yr wythnos am ystafell safonol mewn neuaddau. Mae ystafelloedd en-suite ychydig yn fwy. Edrychwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/llety am y cyfraddau diweddaraf.
Mae llety PCYDDS fel arfer yn costio £90 i £140 yr wythnos yn dibynnu ar fath yr ystafell a'r campws. Mae'r rhan fwyaf o ystafelloedd yn cynnwys wifi, dŵr, gwres a thrydan yn y pris.

patterns: which campus should I go to
faint o gampysau sydd gan pcydds
pa gampws ddylwn i fynd iddo

en: UWTSD has three main campuses: 1) Swansea SA1 Waterfront, the largest in the heart of Swansea. 2) Carmarthen, a traditional campus with strong education and sport programmes. 3) Lampeter, a historic small-town campus famous for humanities. There is also a Cardiff campus for some professional courses. Check uwtsd.ac.uk/campuses for maps.

UWTSD operates across: Swansea SA1 (main campus, city centre), Carmarthen (leafy town campus), Lampeter (small historic campus in Ceredigion), and Cardiff (select courses). Which campus you study at depends on your course.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS dri phrif gampws: 1) Abertawe Glanfa SA1, y mwyaf yng nghanol dinas Abertawe. 2) Caerfyrddin, campws traddodiadol gyda rhaglenni addysg a chwaraeon cryf. 3) Llanbedr Pont Steffan, campws hanesyddol mewn tref fach. Mae campws Caerdydd hefyd ar gyfer rhai cyrsiau proffesiynol.
Mae PCYDDS yn gweithredu yn: SA1 Abertawe (prif gampws), Caerfyrddin (campws tref), Llanbedr Pont Steffan (campws hanesyddol yng Ngheredigion), a Chaerdydd (cyrsiau dethol).

en: The Swansea campus is at SA1 Waterfront, right by the docks in central Swansea, postcode SA1 8EW. Easily accessible by bus and train (Swansea station is a short journey away). Modern facilities include computing labs, studios, a library, and social spaces. It's the largest UWTSD campus.

UWTSD Swansea is at SA1 Waterfront, a modern campus next to the bay. Close to Swansea city centre shops, transport links, and accommodation. Courses here include Computing, Nursing, Business, Art and Design, and more.
cy: Mae campws Abertawe wedi'i leoli yn Glanfa SA1, wrth ymyl y dociau yng nghanol Abertawe, cod post SA1 8EW. Mae'n hawdd ei gyrraedd ar fws a thrên. Mae gan y campws gyfleusterau modern gan gynnwys labordai cyfrifiadur, stiwdios, llyfrgell, a mannau cymdeithasol.
Mae PCYDDS Abertawe yn Glanfa SA1, campws modern wrth ymyl y bae. Yn agos at siopau canol dinas Abertawe, cysylltiadau trafnidiaeth, a llety.

en: The Carmarthen campus is UWTSD's traditional site in the market town of Carmarthen, West Wales, address SA31 3EP. Known for Education, Early Years, and Sport Science programmes. It has a friendly, close-knit community feel and is well connected by train and bus.

UWTSD Carmarthen sits on a hill above the town in a beautiful, leafy setting. Home to Education, Sport, Drama, and Welsh medium courses. On-campus accommodation, sports facilities, and a Students' Union. Easily accessible from Swansea, Cardiff, and West Wales.
cy: Mae campws Caerfyrddin yn safle traddodiadol PCYDDS yn nhref farchnad Caerfyrddin, Gorllewin Cymru, cyfeiriad SA31 3EP. Mae'n adnabyddus am raglenni Addysg, Blynyddoedd Cynnar, a Gwyddor Chwaraeon.
Mae campws Caerfyrddin PCYDDS ar fryn uwchben y dref, lleoliad hardd. Mae'n gartref i Addysg, Chwaraeon, Drama, a chyrsiau cyfrwng Cymraeg. Mae llety ar y campws a chyfleusterau chwaraeon.

en: The Lampeter campus in Ceredigion is UWTSD's oldest and smallest campus, one of the oldest degree-awarding institutions in the UK. A beautiful rural campus known for Humanities, Religion, Archaeology, Welsh Studies, and holistic programmes. Great for students who prefer a quiet, community feel. Address: Lampeter SA48 7ED.

Lampeter is a unique, historic campus in rural West Wales, founded in 1822. Known for Humanities, Theology, and Welsh medium courses. Very small and community-focused. Located in Ceredigion at SA48 7ED.
cy: Mae campws Llanbedr Pont Steffan yng Ngheredigion yn gampws hynaf a lleiaf PCYDDS, un o'r sefydliadau dyfarnu graddau hynaf yn y DU. Campws gwledig hardd sy'n adnabyddus am Ddyniaethau, Crefydd, Archaeoleg, ac Astudiaethau Cymraeg.
Mae Llanbedr Pont Steffan yn gampws unigryw, hanesyddol yng nghefn gwlad Gorllewin Cymru, a sefydlwyd ym 1822. Adnabyddus am Ddyniaethau, Diwinyddiaeth, a chyrsiau cyfrwng Cymraeg.

en: UWTSD has libraries at each campus with extensive physical and digital resources. Search the catalogue at library.uwtsd.ac.uk using your student login. Students can borrow up to 6 books at once and access 24/7 online resources including databases, e-books, and journals. For hours contact library@uwtsd.ac.uk.

UWTSD libraries offer books, e-books, academic journals, study spaces, and printing. Access the catalogue at library.uwtsd.ac.uk. Key features: inter-library loans, 1-to-1 sessions with library staff, and access to databases like JSTOR and ProQuest.

UWTSD libraries are on all campuses with physical books, ebooks, and academic journals. Search the catalogue at library.uwtsd.ac.uk using your student login. You can borrow up to 6 books, access thousands of online journals, and book quiet study spaces. Email library@uwtsd.ac.uk for help.

The library offers books, ebooks, journals, databases (like JSTOR and ProQuest), and study spaces. Access everything online at library.uwtsd.ac.uk with your student credentials. Need help finding sources for an essay? Library staff run research help sessions — ask at your campus library desk.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS lyfrgelloedd ym mhob campws gydag adnoddau ffisegol a digidol helaeth. Chwiliwch y catalog ar library.uwtsd.ac.uk gan ddefnyddio'ch mewngofnodiad myfyrwyr. Gall myfyrwyr fenthyca hyd at 6 llyfr ar y tro.
Mae llyfrgelloedd PCYDDS yn cynnig llyfrau, e-lyfrau, cyfnodolion academaidd, mannau astudio, ac argraffu. Cyrchwch y catalog ar library.uwtsd.ac.uk. Am oriau, cysylltwch â library@pcydds.ac.uk.

Mae llyfrgelloedd PCYDDS ar bob campws gyda llyfrau, e-lyfrau, a chyfnodolion academaidd. Chwiliwch y catalog ar library.uwtsd.ac.uk gyda'ch mewngofnodiad myfyrwyr. Gallwch fenthyca hyd at 6 llyfr a defnyddio cannoedd o gyfnodolion ar-lein. E-bostiwch library@uwtsd.ac.uk am help.

Mae'r llyfrgell yn cynnig llyfrau, e-lyfrau, cyfnodolion, cronfeydd data, a mannau astudio. Cyrchwch y cyfan ar-lein ar library.uwtsd.ac.uk. Angen help dod o hyd i ffynonellau? Cysylltwch â staff y llyfrgell.

patterns: I need someone to talk to

en: UWTSD has a dedicated Student Wellbeing team to support you through any difficulties. Whether you're feeling stressed, anxious, or struggling with personal issues, help is available. Contact Wellbeing at wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk or drop in to Student Services on campus. Asking for help is a sign of strength.

Your wellbeing matters at UWTSD. The Student Wellbeing service offers counselling, mental health support, and crisis guidance. Email wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk to make an appointment. There are also free workshops on managing stress, anxiety, and study-life balance.

You don't have to cope alone. UWTSD's Wellbeing team is here for you — email wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk or drop in to Student Services on your campus. They offer counselling, mental health support, and just a listening ear. If you're in crisis right now, call Health Assured free on 0800 028 3766 (24/7).

Reach out to UWTSD's Wellbeing Service — they provide free, confidential counselling and mental health support for all students. Email wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk to book an appointment. For immediate support, Health Assured is available 24/7 on 0800 028 3766.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS dîm Lles Myfyrwyr pwrpasol i'ch cefnogi drwy unrhyw anawsterau. P'un a ydych chi'n teimlo dan straen, yn bryderus, neu'n cael trafferth â phroblemau personol, mae help ar gael. Cysylltwch â'r tîm Lles ar wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk.
Mae eich lles yn bwysig ym PCYDDS. Mae'r gwasanaeth Lles Myfyrwyr yn cynnig cwnsela, cymorth iechyd meddwl, a chanllawiau argyfwng. Anfonwch e-bost at wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk i wneud apwyntiad.

Does dim rhaid i chi ymdopi ar eich pen eich hun. Mae tîm Lles PCYDDS yma i chi — e-bostiwch wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk neu galwch heibio Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr. Maent yn cynnig cwnsela, cymorth iechyd meddwl, a chlust i wrando. Os ydych chi mewn argyfwng, ffoniwch Health Assured am ddim ar 0800 028 3766 (24/7).
Cysylltwch â Gwasanaeth Lles PCYDDS — maent yn darparu cwnsela cyfrinachol am ddim a chymorth iechyd meddwl. E-bostiwch wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk i drefnu apwyntiad.

patterns: I am not okay and need help now
please help me I am scared
I have nothing to live for

en: I'm really sorry to hear you're feeling this way. Please reach out for help right now. Samaritans: 116 123 (free, 24/7). Crisis Text Line: text SHOUT to 85258. UWTSD Wellbeing: wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk. NHS 111 for urgent medical help. PAPYRUS (under 35): 0800 068 4141. You are not alone, and things can get better. Please talk to someone today.

You matter, and help is available right now. Please contact: Samaritans 116 123 (24/7, free), text SHOUT to 85258, or go to your nearest A&E if in immediate danger. UWTSD Wellbeing (wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk) can also provide urgent support during working hours. You don't have to face this alone.
cy: Mae'n ddrwg iawn gennyf glywed eich bod chi'n teimlo fel hyn. Gofynnwch am help nawr. Samaritans: 116 123 (am ddim, 24/7). Llinell Destun Argyfwng: tecstiwch SHOUT i 85258. Lles PCYDDS: wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk. GIG 111 am help meddygol brys. PAPYRUS (o dan 35): 0800 068 4141. Nid ydych chi ar eich pen eich hun, a gall pethau wella.

Rydych chi'n bwysig, ac mae help ar gael nawr. Cysylltwch â: Samaritans 116 123 (24/7, am ddim), tecstiwch SHOUT i 85258, neu ewch i'ch Adran Achosion Brys agosaf os ydych chi mewn perygl uniongyrchol.

en: UWTSD has an Additional Learning Support Service (ALSS) for students with disabilities, dyslexia, mental health conditions, and other learning difficulties. Support includes extra exam time, note-takers, assistive technology, and study skills sessions. You may also qualify for a Disabled Students' Allowance (DSA). Contact alss@uwtsd.ac.uk.

The ALSS team supports students with dyslexia, ADHD, autism, physical disabilities, mental health conditions, and more. Support is confidential and personalised. Contact alss@uwtsd.ac.uk to arrange an initial assessment. DSA funding from Student Finance Wales can provide equipment and support workers.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS Wasanaeth Cymorth Dysgu Ychwanegol (CCYA) i helpu myfyrwyr ag anableddau, dyslecsia, cyflyrau iechyd meddwl, ac anawsterau dysgu eraill. Cysylltwch ag alss@pcydds.ac.uk i drefnu asesiad.

Mae tîm CCYA ym PCYDDS yn cefnogi myfyrwyr â: dyslecsia, ADHD, awtistiaeth, anableddau corfforol, cyflyrau iechyd meddwl, a mwy. Mae cymorth yn gyfrinachol ac wedi'i bersonoli. Cysylltwch ag alss@pcydds.ac.uk.

en: UWTSD Students' Union is at uwtsdsu.co.uk. They organise events, clubs, societies, and represent student interests. From sports clubs to arts societies, film nights to volunteering, there's something for everyone. The SU also has welfare officers and a free advice service.

The Students' Union is the heart of student social life at UWTSD. Find clubs and societies at uwtsdsu.co.uk. They run freshers' events, sports teams, cultural societies, and provide student representation. Join early in the year to make the most of it.
cy: Mae Undeb Myfyrwyr PCYDDS ar uwtsdsu.co.uk. Maent yn trefnu digwyddiadau, clybiau, cymdeithasau, ac yn cynrychioli buddiannau myfyrwyr i'r brifysgol. O glybiau chwaraeon i gymdeithasau celf, mae rhywbeth i bawb.

Undeb y Myfyrwyr yw calon bywyd cymdeithasol myfyrwyr ym PCYDDS. Dewch o hyd i glybiau a chymdeithasau ar uwtsdsu.co.uk. Maent yn rhedeg digwyddiadau gwyrddion, timau chwaraeon, cymdeithasau diwylliannol, ac yn darparu cynrychiolaeth myfyrwyr.

en: UWTSD graduation ceremonies are typically held in summer (July) and winter (December/January). You'll receive an invitation once you've completed your degree. Gown hire is arranged through the graduation service. Ceremonies are usually at campuses or local venues. Visit uwtsd.ac.uk/graduation for dates and how to register.

Graduation at UWTSD is a fantastic celebration. Ceremonies are usually in summer. Register your attendance and arrange gown hire. Family and friends are normally invited — about 2 to 3 guests per graduate. Your degree certificate is presented on the day. See uwtsd.ac.uk/graduation for the latest information.
cy: Mae seremonïau graddio PCYDDS fel arfer yn cael eu cynnal yn yr haf (Gorffennaf) a'r gaeaf (Rhagfyr/Ionawr). Byddwch yn derbyn gwahoddiad pan fyddwch chi wedi cwblhau eich gradd. Edrychwch ar pcydds.ac.uk/graddio am ddyddiadau seremoni.
Mae graddio ym PCYDDS yn ddathliad gwych. Mae seremonïau fel arfer yn yr haf. Bydd angen i chi gofrestru eich presenoldeb a threfnu llogi gŵn. Gweler pcydds.ac.uk/graddio am y wybodaeth ddiweddaraf.

patterns: how do I see my marks
when do I find out my grade

en: Your results and grades are available through the MyStudy portal at mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. View module results, assignment feedback, and your overall academic record there. Results are usually released within a few weeks of completing assessments. For queries about marks, contact your lecturer or academic department.

Check your grades on MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk). UK degree classifications are: First Class (70%+), 2:1 (60-69%), 2:2 (50-59%), Third (40-49%). If you believe a mark is wrong, you can formally appeal. Contact your Student Registry for the appeals process.
cy: Mae eich canlyniadau a graddau ar gael drwy borth MyStudy ar mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk. Gallwch weld canlyniadau modiwlau, adborth aseiniad, a'ch cofnod academaidd cyffredinol yno.

Gwiriwch eich graddau ar MyStudy (mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk). Dosbarthiadau gradd DU: Dosbarth Cyntaf (70%+), 2:1 (60-69%), 2:2 (50-59%), Trydedd (40-49%). Os ydych chi'n credu bod marc yn anghywir, gallwch apelio'n ffurfiol.

en: UWTSD is a proudly bilingual university. Many courses are available through the medium of Welsh, especially at Carmarthen and Lampeter campuses. Welsh medium students may be eligible for a Welsh Language Bursary. Contact cymraeg@uwtsd.ac.uk for more information.

Welsh is at the heart of UWTSD. The university offers Welsh-medium and bilingual teaching across many subjects. Carmarthen and Lampeter campuses have a strong Welsh culture. For support in Welsh or to study through Welsh, contact cymraeg@uwtsd.ac.uk. Welsh language improvement courses are also available.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn brifysgol ddwyieithog falch. Mae llawer o gyrsiau ar gael trwy gyfrwng y Gymraeg, yn enwedig ar gampysau Caerfyrddin a Llanbedr Pont Steffan. Cysylltwch â cymraeg@pcydds.ac.uk am fwy o wybodaeth.
Mae'r Gymraeg wrth galon PCYDDS. Mae'r brifysgol yn cynnig addysgu cyfrwng Cymraeg a dwyieithog ar draws llawer o bynciau. Cysylltwch â cymraeg@pcydds.ac.uk. Mae cyrsiau gwella Cymraeg hefyd ar gael.

patterns: university of wales trinity saint david
good reasons to study at uwtsd
prifysgol cymru y drindod dewi sant
faint o fyfyrwyr sydd ym pcydds

en: UWTSD (University of Wales Trinity Saint David) was formed in 2010 through a merger of Trinity University College Carmarthen and Swansea Metropolitan University, with heritage dating back to 1822 at Lampeter. Known for excellent teaching quality, student satisfaction, and strong links to Welsh culture. Around 10,000 students study here.

UWTSD is a proud Welsh university with 200 years of history. Known for strong teaching, practical courses, and a focus on student wellbeing. It performs well in student satisfaction surveys and is accredited by the Quality Assurance Agency (QAA) with many courses holding professional accreditations.
cy: Sefydlwyd PCYDDS (Prifysgol Cymru Y Drindod Dewi Sant) yn 2010 drwy uno Coleg Prifysgol y Drindod Caerfyrddin a Phrifysgol Fetropolitan Abertawe, gyda threftadaeth yn dyddio'n ôl i 1822 yn Llanbedr Pont Steffan. Mae'n adnabyddus am ansawdd addysgu rhagorol a boddhad myfyrwyr.

Mae PCYDDS yn brifysgol Gymreig falch gyda 200 mlynedd o hanes. Yn adnabyddus am addysgu cryf, cyrsiau ymarferol, a ffocws ar les myfyrwyr. Mae PCYDDS wedi'i achredu gan yr Asiantaeth Sicrhau Ansawdd (QAA).

en: UWTSD main contacts: General enquiries: 01267 676767 or enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk. Admissions: admissions@uwtsd.ac.uk. Student Services: studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk. IT Services: itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk or 01792 481 111. Wellbeing: wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk. Website: uwtsd.ac.uk.
Main UWTSD contact: Phone 01267 676767, website uwtsd.ac.uk, email enquiries@uwtsd.ac.uk. Each department has its own contact. Ask me what you need and I can give you the right details.
cy: Prif gysylltiadau PCYDDS: Ymholiadau cyffredinol: 01267 676767 neu enquiries@pcydds.ac.uk. Derbyniadau: admissions@pcydds.ac.uk. Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr: studentservices@pcydds.ac.uk. Gwasanaethau TG: itservices@pcydds.ac.uk neu 01792 481 111. Lles: wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk. Gwefan: pcydds.ac.uk.
Prif gyswllt PCYDDS: Ffôn 01267 676767, gwefan pcydds.ac.uk, e-bost enquiries@pcydds.ac.uk. Gofynnwch i mi beth sydd ei angen arnoch chi a gallaf roi'r manylion cywir.

patterns: dod o hyd i swydd ar ôl y brifysgol
I don't know what to do after uni
help dod o hyd i swydd

en: UWTSD has a Careers and Employability service helping with job searching, CV writing, interview preparation, and career planning. Available throughout your studies and after graduation. Contact careers@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit the Careers Service in Student Services on campus.

The Careers team at UWTSD offers 1-to-1 appointments, CV reviews, mock interviews, and access to job vacancy boards. Contact careers@uwtsd.ac.uk. UWTSD has strong links with local and national employers, many of whom run placement years and graduate schemes. Start engaging early in your degree.

UWTSD's Careers Service can help with CV writing, interview prep, job searching, and career planning. Access the MyCareer portal or email careers@uwtsd.ac.uk to book a one-to-one appointment. Graduates get support for 2 years after completing their degree too.

The Careers Service offers personalised guidance for finding work experience, internships, and graduate jobs. They run CV clinics, mock interviews, and employer events. Email careers@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit uwtsd.ac.uk/careers.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS wasanaeth Gyrfaoedd a Chyflogadwyedd i'ch helpu gyda chwilio am swyddi, ysgrifennu CV, paratoi ar gyfer cyfweliadau, a chynllunio gyrfa. Cysylltwch â careers@pcydds.ac.uk.
Mae tîm Gyrfaoedd ym PCYDDS yn cynnig apwyntiadau un-i-un, adolygiadau CV, cyfweliadau ffug, a mynediad at fyrddau swyddi gwag. Cysylltwch â careers@pcydds.ac.uk.
Gall Gwasanaeth Gyrfaoedd PCYDDS helpu gydag ysgrifennu CV, paratoi ar gyfer cyfweliad, chwilio am swyddi, a chynllunio gyrfa. E-bostiwch careers@uwtsd.ac.uk i drefnu apwyntiad un-i-un.

Mae'r Gwasanaeth Gyrfaoedd yn cynnig canllawiau personol am brofiad gwaith, lleoliadau, a swyddi graddedigion. Maent yn cynnal clinigau CV, cyfweliadau ymarfer, a digwyddiadau cyflogwyr. E-bostiwch careers@uwtsd.ac.uk.

patterns: ar ei hôl hi gyda gwaith cwrs
yn cael trafferth â llwyth gwaith

en: Academic stress is very common and completely understandable. Here's what can help: 1) Talk to your personal tutor, they can advise on extensions or support. 2) Contact Wellbeing at wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk. 3) Use the library for study skills help. 4) Break work into smaller chunks. You've got this.

Exam and assignment stress affects most students. UWTSD support includes: your personal tutor who can advise on extensions, Wellbeing at wellbeing@uwtsd.ac.uk for counselling, and study skills workshops through the library. The Students' Union welfare officer can also help with practical issues.
cy: Mae straen academaidd yn gyffredin iawn ac yn gwbl ddealladwy. Dyma beth all helpu: 1) Siaradwch â'ch tiwtor personol. 2) Cysylltwch â Lles ar wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk. 3) Defnyddiwch y llyfrgell am help sgiliau astudio. 4) Rhannwch y gwaith yn ddarnau llai.

Mae straen arholiadau ac aseiniad yn effeithio ar y rhan fwyaf o fyfyrwyr. Mae cymorth PCYDDS yn cynnwys: eich tiwtor personol, Lles ar wellbeing@pcydds.ac.uk am gwnsela, a gweithdai sgiliau astudio trwy'r llyfrgell.

patterns: where can I find my timetable
can you help me find my timetable
where do I find my timetable
how do I find my timetable
I need to find my timetable
how do I check my timetable
how do I view my timetable
where do I see my schedule
how do I see my classes
how do I see my lectures
what time does my class start
ble i ddod o hyd i fy amserlen
can you help with my timetable

en: Your timetable is on the MyStudy portal — go to mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk and log in with your student number and password. Once you're in, look for the 'Timetable' section in the menu. If your timetable isn't showing up or a module is missing, contact your department administrator or Student Registry at registry@uwtsd.ac.uk.

To find your timetable, log into MyStudy at mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk using your student credentials. Your personal timetable shows all your lectures, seminars and lab sessions. If you have a clash or something looks wrong, speak to your Programme Director or email registry@uwtsd.ac.uk.
cy: Mae eich amserlen ar borth MyStudy — ewch i mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk a mewngofnodwch gyda'ch rhif myfyriwr a chyfrinair. Unwaith i chi fewngofnodi, edrychwch am yr adran 'Amserlen' yn y ddewislen. Os nad yw eich amserlen yn ymddangos, cysylltwch â'r cofrestrfa: registry@uwtsd.ac.uk.

I weld eich amserlen, mewngofnodwch i MyStudy ar mystudy.uwtsd.ac.uk gyda'ch manylion myfyriwr. Mae eich amserlen bersonol yn dangos eich holl ddarlithoedd, seminarau a sesiynau labordy. Os oes gwrthdrawiad neu rywbeth o'i le, siaradwch â'ch Cyfarwyddwr Rhaglen neu e-bostiwch registry@uwtsd.ac.uk.

en: UWTSD provides printing facilities across all campuses in libraries and computer labs. Printing is charged to a print credit account which you can top up on campus. Contact IT Services at itservices@uwtsd.ac.uk or your campus library for setup help.

Printing is available in UWTSD libraries and computer labs. You need print credits on your student account, purchasable on campus. Black and white printing is cheaper than colour. For help setting up printing on your device, visit uwtsd.ac.uk/it or call 01792 481 111.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn darparu cyfleusterau argraffu ar draws pob campws mewn llyfrgelloedd a labordai cyfrifiadur. Mae argraffu'n cael ei godi i gyfrif credyd argraffu. Cysylltwch â Gwasanaethau TG ar itservices@pcydds.ac.uk am help.
Mae argraffu ar gael mewn llyfrgelloedd a labordai cyfrifiadur PCYDDS. Bydd angen credydau argraffu arnoch chi ar eich cyfrif myfyrwyr, y gellir eu prynu ar y campws.

patterns: beth mae gwasanaethau myfyrwyr yn ei wneud

en: Student Services at UWTSD is your one-stop support hub, covering: Wellbeing and counselling, Disability and learning support, Careers advice, Financial hardship, International student support, and Accommodation queries. Find them on campus or email studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk.

UWTSD Student Services covers almost everything outside your studies: wellbeing, careers, finance, accommodation, disability support, and more. They're on each campus and reachable at studentservices@uwtsd.ac.uk. Do not hesitate to reach out, they are there to help you succeed.
cy: Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr ym PCYDDS yw eich canolfan cymorth, yn ymdrin â: Lles a chwnsela, Cymorth anabledd a dysgu ychwanegol, Cyngor gyrfaoedd, Caledi ariannol, Cymorth myfyrwyr rhyngwladol, ac Ymholiadau llety. Anfonwch e-bost at studentservices@pcydds.ac.uk.
Mae Gwasanaethau Myfyrwyr PCYDDS yn ymdrin â bron popeth y tu allan i'ch astudiaethau. Cysylltwch â studentservices@pcydds.ac.uk. Peidiwch ag oedi cyn cysylltu, maent yno i'ch helpu chi i lwyddo.

en: UWTSD offers academic English language support through the library and Learning Support teams. Help includes academic writing workshops, grammar support, and 1-to-1 writing consultations. International students can also access additional ESOL support. Contact learningsupport@uwtsd.ac.uk for available sessions.

Need help with academic writing or English language skills? UWTSD's Learning Support team runs workshops and drop-in sessions. The library also has academic writing guides. Contact alss@uwtsd.ac.uk or library@uwtsd.ac.uk. Many departments also offer subject-specific writing support.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig cymorth iaith Saesneg academaidd trwy'r llyfrgell a thimau Cymorth Dysgu. Mae cymorth yn cynnwys gweithdai ysgrifennu academaidd, cymorth gramadeg, ac ymgynghoriadau ysgrifennu un-i-un. Cysylltwch â learningsupport@pcydds.ac.uk.
Oes angen help arnoch chi gyda'ch ysgrifennu academaidd? Mae tîm Cymorth Dysgu PCYDDS yn rhedeg gweithdai a sesiynau galw-i-mewn. Cysylltwch ag alss@pcydds.ac.uk neu library@pcydds.ac.uk.

en: Full-time undergraduate fees are £9,535 per year for 2025/26. Postgraduate taught fees start at £7,800 on campus or £6,800 online. International fees vary. For detailed information, visit our fees page at www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/fees-and-finance.

Undergraduate tuition: £9,535/year. Postgraduate tuition: £7,800 on campus or £6,800 online. International students pay different rates. For a full fee schedule, check www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/fees-and-finance/tuition-fee-schedule
cy: Ffioedd israddedig amser llawn: £9,535 y flwyddyn am 2025/26. Ffioedd ôl-radd addysgu: £7,800 ar y campws neu £6,800 ar-lein. Mae ffioedd rhyngwladol yn amrywio. Am fanylion llawn, ewch i www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/fees-and-finance.

Ffioedd israddedig: £9,535 y flwyddyn. Ffioedd ôl-radd: £7,800 ar y campws neu £6,800 ar-lein. Mae myfyrwyr rhyngwladol yn talu cyfraddau gwahanol. Am restr ffioedd gyflawn, gwiriwch www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/fees-and-finance

patterns: where can I get financial help

en: UWTSD has financial support available for students facing hardship. Contact the Money Support team at moneysupport@uwtsd.ac.uk or visit Student Services on campus. There are hardship funds, emergency grants, and bursaries available — don't struggle alone, reach out early.

If you're struggling financially, the Money Support team can help. Email moneysupport@uwtsd.ac.uk or drop into Student Services. Emergency funds and bursaries are available for eligible students. The earlier you contact them, the more options you have.
cy: Mae cymorth ariannol ar gael i fyfyrwyr sy'n wynebu caledi. Cysylltwch â'r tîm Cymorth Arian ar moneysupport@uwtsd.ac.uk neu ewch i Wasanaethau Myfyrwyr ar y campws. Mae cronfeydd caledi, grantiau brys, a bwrsariaethau ar gael.
Os ydych chi'n cael trafferth yn ariannol, gall y tîm Cymorth Arian helpu. E-bostiwch moneysupport@uwtsd.ac.uk. Mae cronfeydd brys a bwrsariaethau ar gael i fyfyrwyr cymwys.

patterns: how do I apply to UWTSD
what do I need to apply

en: Undergraduate students typically apply through UCAS. Postgraduate students can apply directly to UWTSD or through our agents abroad. The application process includes submitting your qualifications, personal statement, and references. Visit www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/how-apply for step-by-step guidance.

For undergraduates, use UCAS. For postgraduate courses, apply directly to us at www.uwtsd.ac.uk/apply/postgraduate/applying-direct-postgraduate. For PGCE teacher training, apply via UCAS. Our International team can help: iru@uwtsd.ac.uk
cy: Mae myfyrwyr israddedig fel arfer yn gwneud cais drwy UCAS. Mae myfyrwyr ôl-radd yn gallu gwneud cais yn uniongyrchol i PCYDDS. Ewch i www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/how-apply am arweiniad cam-wrth-gam.
Ar gyfer myfyrwyr israddedig, defnyddiwch UCAS. Ar gyfer cyrsiau ôl-radd, gwneud cais yn uniongyrchol i ni.

en: UWTSD offers a range of postgraduate programs including taught Master's degrees (MA, MSc, MBA), research degrees (PhD, MPhil), professional doctorates, and PGCE teacher training. Many courses are available full-time, part-time, or online. Postgraduate fees start at £7,800 (on campus) or £6,800 (online). Apply directly or visit www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/postgraduate-and-pgce

Postgraduate options include Master's degrees across 20+ subjects, professional doctorates (DProf, EDD), PhDs, and PGCE courses for teacher training. Study full-time, part-time, or online. View all courses and apply at www.uwtsd.ac.uk or contact our postgraduate team.
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig amrywiaeth o raglenni ôl-radd gan gynnwys graddau Master, cyrsiau PGCE, a graddau ymchwil. Ewch i www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/postgraduate-and-pgce
Mae opsiynau ôl-radd yn cynnwys graddau Master ar draws 20+ pwnc a chyrsiau hyfforddi athrawon.

en: UWTSD has six campuses: Carmarthen (main campus), Swansea, Lampeter, Cardiff, London, and Birmingham. Different programs are available at different locations. Each campus has its own library, student support services, and accommodation options. Visit individual campus pages for more details at www.uwtsd.ac.uk

Our six campuses are: Carmarthen, Swansea, Lampeter (Wales), plus London, Birmingham, and Cardiff. Each offers different programs and facilities. Check www.uwtsd.ac.uk for campus-specific course offerings and services.
cy: Mae gan PCYDDS chwe champws: Aberteifi (prif campws), Abertawe, Llambed, Caerdydd, Llundain, ac Birmingham. Mae gwahanol raglenni ar gael mewn gwahanol leoliadau. Ewch i www.uwtsd.ac.uk am fanylion campws penodol.
Ein chwe champws yw: Aberteifi, Abertawe, Llambed (Cymru), ac yna Llundain, Birmingham, a Chaerdydd.

en: UWTSD offers undergraduate degrees across 20+ subject areas including Business, Engineering, Creative Arts, Education, Healthcare, Law, Science, and more. Most programs are 3 years full-time. We also offer degree apprenticeships, sandwich placement years, and international year options. Search all courses at www.uwtsd.ac.uk/programme-search

We offer Bachelor degrees (BA, BSc), Foundation degrees, and degree apprenticeships in 20+ subjects. Programs can be studied full-time (3 years), part-time, with a placement year, or with an international year. View program details and entry requirements at www.uwtsd.ac.uk/study/undergraduate
cy: Mae PCYDDS yn cynnig graddau israddedig ar draws 20+ maes pwnc gan gynnwys Busnes, Peirianneg, Celfyddydau Creadigol, Addysg, a mwy. Ewch i www.uwtsd.ac.uk/programme-search
Rydym yn cynnig graddau Bachelor (BA, BSc) a Graddau Sylfaen mewn 20+ pwnc.
